center.title: Trust & License Center
center.subtitle: Transparency about ownership, licensing, data, and your subscription.
center.graceBanner: Payment is overdue. You are within the 3-day grace period with full access. Please update billing to avoid service pause.
center.pausedBanner: Services are paused due to an overdue subscription.

license_information.title: License Information
body: You receive a limited license to use Aipify software for your organization.
This license is tied to your subscription plan and approved domains.
License status is shown in the sidebar and on this page.

software_ownership.title: Software Ownership
body: Aipify is proprietary software owned by {owner}.
Customers receive a license to use the software.
Customers do not receive ownership rights to the software itself.
Unauthorized copying, redistribution, reverse engineering, or tampering is prohibited.

subscription_status.title: Subscription Status
body: Your plan, renewal date, and usage limits are listed above.

data_ownership.title: Data Ownership
body: Your business data remains under your control.
Aipify stores intelligence and operational metadata required to deliver its services.
Aipify does not assume ownership of your operational systems.
You may revoke permissions according to platform policies.

anonymised_impact.title: Anonymised Impact Metrics
body: Aipify collects anonymised operational metrics to measure service performance and platform impact.
These metrics do not include your sales data, customer content, emails, transactions, inventory, or private business records.
Only aggregated counts and outcome trends are stored — never message content or business-sensitive records.
Global marketing statements combine multiple tenants and never reveal individual customer business performance.

product_improvement.title: Customer Feedback & Product Improvement Policy
body: Purpose: Aipify continuously improves its services based on customer interactions, voluntary feedback, and aggregated usage insights.

Principles: We are transparent about how feedback is collected. We only collect information necessary to improve the platform. We do not sell customer feedback data. We do not use individual feedback for advertising purposes. Customers retain control over the information they choose to share.

What we may collect: feature ratings; voluntary feedback submissions; improvement suggestions; bug reports; feature requests; anonymous product usage statistics; interaction outcomes (e.g. whether a suggested action was helpful); aggregated platform analytics.

Purpose of collection: improve existing features; identify usability issues; prioritize product development; detect recurring problems; enhance customer experiences; improve AI-assisted recommendations; understand how Aipify can better support organizations.

What we do not do: sell feedback data to third parties; use feedback for targeted advertising; share customer-specific feedback publicly without permission; monitor communications unrelated to Aipify services.
Voluntary participation: Providing written feedback is voluntary. You may choose whether you wish to be contacted regarding your feedback.

Transparency: Where feedback mechanisms exist within the platform, Aipify clearly indicates when information is collected to improve products and services — including feedback buttons, improvement forms, feature ratings, and product surveys.
Trust principle: Feedback is a gift. Aipify exists to serve its customers. Listening honestly and improving continuously are essential parts of that responsibility.

company_identity.title: About Aipify Group AS
body: Aipify Group AS is headquartered in Bergen, Norway.
Official brand statement: Bergen. Norway. For the world.
Aipify was founded in Bergen — shaped by Norwegian values of trust, quality, and long-term thinking.
Our ambition is global. Our values remain Norwegian.
We build intelligent business systems designed to help organizations work smarter, respond faster, and grow with confidence — for organizations everywhere.

security_principles.title: Security Principles
body: Aipify does not function as an employee monitoring system.
Aipify does not access cameras or microphones.
Aipify only accesses approved systems.
Permissions remain transparent and auditable.

update_policy.title: Update Policy
body: Aipify periodically receives updates to improve security, stability, and functionality.
Customers receive advance notice before planned maintenance.
Critical security updates may be applied with shortened notice periods.

payment_policy.title: Payment Policy
body: Grace period: 3 calendar days after payment becomes overdue.
During grace period: warning notifications are shown and full access remains available.
After grace period: Aipify services pause, configuration and metadata are preserved.
Upon successful payment: services reactivate automatically with previous configuration restored.

contact_information.title: Contact Information
body: Headquarters: Bergen, Norway
Official website: {website}
Support: {support}
Privacy: {privacy}

legal_information.title: Legal Information
body: Software owner: {owner}
Website: {website}
Support contact: {support}
Privacy contact: {privacy}

anti_tampering.title: Anti-Tampering Policy
body: Configure Aipify only through supported interfaces.
Unauthorized modification of licensing, security controls, or installation mechanisms is prohibited.
Aipify may disable installations that have been intentionally compromised.

enterprise_note.title: Enterprise
body: Enterprise customers may negotiate custom agreements.
Extended grace periods, custom maintenance windows, dedicated deployments, and customer-hosted intelligence are available.
